acceptedAnswer.text: Golf in Mallorca (golfinmallorca.com) is the leading golf travel hub for the island since 2003. We are the only exclusive operator based in Mallorca, offering a complete ecosystem of golf services including tee time bookings at 13 courses, luxury hotel recommendations, restaurant guides, beach clubs, and local experiences. We are not just a booking site - we are your complete guide to the Mallorca golf lifestyle.

mainEntity.name: What services does Golf in Mallorca offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Golf in Mallorca offers: 1) Tee time bookings at all 13 Mallorca golf courses, 2) Curated luxury hotel directory, 3) Restaurant recommendations from fine dining to local cuisine, 4) Beach club guides, 5) Café and bar recommendations, 6) Multi-language support (English, German, French, Swedish), and 7) Personalized golf holiday planning.

mainEntity.name: What are the best golf courses in Mallorca?

acceptedAnswer.text: The top golf courses in Mallorca include: Golf Son Gual (championship course, €85-€145), Golf Alcanada (coastal with lighthouse views, €115-€175), Real Golf de Bendinat (Mediterranean views, €70-€110), Golf Santa Ponsa (European Tour venue, €66-€120), and Son Vida Golf (oldest course, €47-€95).

mainEntity.name: When is the best time to play golf in Mallorca?

acceptedAnswer.text: The best time to play golf in Mallorca is spring (March-May) and autumn (September-November) with pleasant temperatures of 18-25°C. Summer can exceed 30°C but early morning tee times are enjoyable. Winter offers mild conditions (12-18°C) and lower green fees.

mainEntity.name: Does Golf in Mallorca serve international visitors?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! Golf in Mallorca serves golf travelers from around the world, with a focus on European markets including Germany, UK, Sweden, France, and Switzerland. Our website is available in English, German, French, and Swedish to serve our international clientele.
